summary.zh: 面板管理工作台,是 Studio 的设置中枢。它有四个区:工作台启用与排序、多模态模型绑定、cli-provider 认证健康、marketplace 插件计数,四块都与设置面板(SettingsPanel)的 sections registry 保持同源——在这里开关/排序工作台、绑定各通道的模型、检查 CLI 后端认证状态、查看已装插件数量。
summary.en: The Admin workbench — Studio's settings hub. It has four sections: workbench enable/order, multi-modal model bindings, cli-provider auth health, and marketplace plugin counts, all kept in sync with the SettingsPanel sections registry — toggle/reorder workbenches, bind models per channel, check CLI-backend auth status, and see how many plugins are installed.

body.zh:
工作台启用 / 排序
多模态模型绑定
cli-provider 认证健康
marketplace 插件计数
body.en:
Workbench enable/order
Multi-modal model bindings
cli-provider auth health
Marketplace plugin counts

body.zh: 与 Studio 设置面板(SettingsPanel)的 sections 同源
body.en: Kept in sync with Studio's SettingsPanel sections
